about.title: About Telemaster
about.lead: We want Telegram operations to move from “heroics” to repeatable systems.
about.missionDesc: Use automation and visibility to reduce the complexity of community and channel ops.
about.audienceDesc: Community admins, content teams, support, growth, and operations.
about.p1Desc: Spam and noise hurt experience; admins spend hours on repetitive work.
about.p2Desc: Without scheduling and review, it’s hard to ship quality content consistently.
about.p3Desc: Unclear permissions and missing audit trails lead to mistakes and overreach.
about.p4Desc: Gut feel without metrics—hard to improve and reuse what works.
about.seoDescription: Telemaster helps teams run Telegram communities and channels with automation and clarity.

pricing.title: Plans & pricing
pricing.lead: A management platform for Telegram groups, channels, and bots. Pick a plan that fits your team size and automation needs.
pricing.enterpriseLead: Higher concurrency, stricter permissions, and richer integrations.

0.a: Yes—annual plans often include better pricing and predictable budgeting.

1.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
1.a: Yes. Upgrades apply immediately; downgrades apply on the next billing cycle to keep operations stable.

2.q: How do you handle data security and permissions?
2.a: Business plans add finer-grained roles, audit logs, and risk policies for team collaboration.

2.name: Business
2.description: For organizations and multi-team operations focused on security and scale.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.disclaimer: This is sample legal text for the marketing site and SEO structure. Replace with a version reviewed by counsel before launch.
terms.s1p: Telemaster provides tools and interfaces to manage Telegram groups, channels, and bots (subject to actual product capabilities). We may update, adjust, or add features from time to time.
terms.s2l1: You must provide accurate, lawful information and keep credentials secure.
terms.s2l2: You must not use the service for illegal activity or to infringe others’ rights.
terms.s2l3: You are responsible for actions and content under your account.
terms.s3p: Pricing and entitlements are as shown on the pricing page. Refunds and billing cycles follow the applicable commercial terms and agreements.
terms.s4p: You must ensure your Telegram-side management and automation comply with applicable laws and Telegram’s rules. You are responsible for content and compliance in groups/channels you manage.
terms.s5p: To the extent permitted by law, Telemaster is not liable for indirect damages, lost profits, or data loss. The service may be interrupted due to networks, third-party platforms, or force majeure.
terms.s6p: If you have questions about these terms, please visit
terms.seoDescription: Telemaster terms of use, liability, and compliance.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.disclaimer: This is sample privacy text for the marketing site and SEO structure. Add real processing details and review with legal/compliance before launch.
privacy.l1: Account info: email and other data used to register and sign in.
privacy.l2: Usage data: feature usage and operation logs (for security and product improvement).
privacy.l3: Device & technical info: browser type and basic network info (for troubleshooting and security).
privacy.u1: Provide, maintain, and improve the service.
privacy.u3: Communicate with you (e.g. support and notices).
privacy.p3: We do not sell your personal information. We only share information when necessary to provide the service, as required by law, or with your consent.
privacy.p4: We use reasonable technical and organizational measures, but no internet transmission is perfectly secure.
privacy.p5: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your information. Please visit
privacy.seoDescription: How Telemaster collects, uses, and protects information.

alliance.faqTitle: A few things you may care about

0.q: What teams is the alliance for?
0.a: Both established traffic owners and product teams looking for channels—as long as you’re willing to run partnerships as a process and review results continuously.

1.q: Does Telemaster collect or settle payments for me?
1.a: Not by default. The alliance focuses on matching + distribution + tracking + collaboration. Settlement features depend on availability and agreements.

2.q: How do we avoid hurting the community experience?
2.a: Frequency caps, structured entry points, creative guidelines, and anti-spam policies reduce noise; we prefer scenario-based conversion (onboarding, lead magnets, event signups).

3.a: Contact us with your traffic, product, or service details—we’ll suggest matches and a collaboration path.

alliance.nextLead: Share your traffic, product, or service details—we’ll suggest matches and a collaboration path.
alliance.seoDescription: Telemaster Telegram alliance: connect traffic with monetization—matching, standard distribution, attribution, and settlement collaboration.
